Tool reply2026-07-01T01:34:48.306Z
1	# KnowledgeBase · 个人知识库
2	
3	记录与 AI 讨论的各种方案,纯静态、离线可用的文档浏览器。左侧目录树,右侧预览,支持 **Markdown / PDF / Word(.docx) / 图片**。
4	
5	## ✨ 特性
6	
7	- 📂 **自动目录树** — 把文件丢进 `docs/`,左侧自动按文件夹分组
8	- 🔍 **快速搜索** — 按文件名/标题即时筛选
9	- 🎨 **多格式预览** — md(代码高亮 + Mermaid 图表)、pdf、docx、图片
10	- 🌗 **亮/暗主题** — 一键切换
11	- 📦 **零依赖离线** — 第三方库已本地化,断网也能用
12	- 🚀 **双端可用** — 本地双击启动 / GitHub Pages 在线访问
13	
14	## 🖥️ 本地使用(Windows)
15	
16	双击根目录的 **`启动.bat`** 即可。它会自动扫描文档、启动本地服务(用 Windows 自带 PowerShell,**无需安装 Node/Python**)、打开浏览器。
17	
18	> ⚠️ 不要直接双击 `index.html`:浏览器的 `file://` 安全限制会导致读不了本地 md/pdf 文件。必须通过 `启动.bat` 起本地服务。
19	
20	## 🌐 在线访问(GitHub Pages)
21	
22	1. 把项目推送到 GitHub
23	2. 仓库 **Settings → Pages → Build and deployment → Source** 选 **GitHub Actions**
24	3. 推送到 `main` 分支后会自动构建部署
25	4. 访问 `https://<用户名>.github.io/KnowledgeBase/`
26	
27	每次 push,GitHub Actions 会自动重新扫描 `docs/` 生成目录清单并部署。
28	
29	## 📝 添加文档
30	
31	把文件放进 `docs/`,支持子文件夹分组。文件名可加数字前缀控制排序(如 `01_xxx.md`,显示时自动隐藏前缀)。详见 `docs/00_使用说明.md`。
32	
33	## 📁 项目结构
34	
35	```
36	KnowledgeBase/
37	├── index.html              # 入口
38	├── 启动.bat                # Windows 一键启动
39	├── manifest.json           # 目录清单(自动生成)
40	├── docs/                   # 你的文档放这里
41	├── assets/
42	│   ├── css/                # 设计 token + 样式
43	│   ├── js/                 # app.js(主逻辑) + viewers.js(预览器)
44	│   └── vendor/             # 本地化的第三方库
45	├── scripts/
46	│   ├── generate-manifest.ps1   # 扫描 docs/ 生成清单
47	│   └── serve.ps1               # 本地静态服务器
48	└── .github/workflows/pages.yml # 自动部署
49	```
50	
51	## 🔧 技术说明
52	
53	- **Markdown**: marked.js + highlight.js + mermaid
54	- **PDF**: PDF.js
55	- **Word**: docx-preview(仅 .docx,复杂排版还原度有限)
56	- 纯前端、无构建步骤
57

Assistant2026-07-01T01:37:39.391Z
Thinking

好的，现在我对项目有了基本了解。让我总结一下这个项目的核心信息：

项目概况

KnowledgeBase - 个人知识库项目

主要特性

  1. 纯静态的文档浏览器：支持 Markdown、PDF、Word(.docx)、图片等多种格式
  2. 自动目录树：基于文件系统自动生成左侧导航
  3. 双端运行：本地双击 启动.bat 或部署到 GitHub Pages
  4. 零依赖离线：所有第三方库已本地化（marked.js、highlight.js、mermaid、PDF.js、docx-preview）
  5. 亮/暗主题切换

技术栈

  • 纯前端实现，无构建步骤
  • PowerShell 脚本用于本地服务和清单生成
  • GitHub Actions 自动部署

核心文件

  • index.html - 单页应用入口
  • manifest.json - 文档目录清单（自动扫描 docs/ 生成）
  • 启动.bat - Windows 一键启动脚本
  • scripts/generate-manifest.ps1 - 扫描文档生成清单
  • scripts/serve.ps1 - 本地静态服务器
  • assets/js/app.js - 主逻辑
  • assets/js/viewers.js - 各类文件预览器

当前文档内容

根据 manifest.json，docs/ 下有： - 技术方案：本地Claude绘制AI原型设计图方案、AI生成网页图片物料方案对比 - 示例方案：方案讨论模板 - 物料测试：测试A_PollinationsAI版、测试B_Claude原生SVG版（包含测试图片素材） - 使用说明：00_使用说明.md

Git 状态

  • 当前分支：main
  • 修改：README.md 已修改
  • 新增：.github/、assets/、docs/、scripts/、index.html、manifest.json、启动.bat

现在用户说"先熟悉下项目我们来讨论问题"，我已经熟悉完了，应该告诉用户我已经了解项目结构，等待他提出具体问题。

已经熟悉了项目结构 ✓

项目概览

KnowledgeBase — 个人知识库文档浏览器

核心特性

  • 📂 纯静态、离线可用的文档系统
  • 🎨 支持 Markdown / PDF / Word / 图片预览
  • 🔍 自动生成目录树 + 快速搜索
  • 🌗 亮/暗主题切换
  • 🚀 本地双击启动（启动.bat）/ GitHub Pages 在线部署

技术架构

  • 前端：纯 HTML/CSS/JS，无构建步骤
  • 第三方库：marked、highlight.js、mermaid、PDF.js、docx-preview（已本地化）
  • 自动化：PowerShell 脚本生成清单 + GitHub Actions 部署

当前文档分类

  • 技术方案（AI 原型设计、物料生成方案对比）
  • 示例方案（讨论模板）
  • 物料测试（Pollinations AI vs Claude SVG 对比测试）

有什么问题要讨论？或者需要我做什么？

User2026-07-01T01:38:20.663Z

我们要讨论的问题是,claude能够读取自己的对话信息吗,从对话信息里面获取我需要整理的内容,比如我需要整理开发某个项目中遇到的问题,可以提取的经验,用于指导后续的开发.这样我就需要把这个项目开发时的所有对话信息都作为上下文来整理.

Assistant2026-07-01T01:38:31.773Z
Thinking

用户提出了一个很有价值的问题：Claude 能否读取自己的对话历史，从中提取经验和问题整理成文档？

这涉及几个关键点：

  1. Claude Code 的对话持久化机制
  2. Claude Code 确实会保存对话历史

  3. 通常存储在本地文件系统中

  4. 对话存储位置

  5. 根据我看到的环境信息，用户的 Claude 配置在 C:\Users\fjyu9\.claude\

  6. 对话历史通常在 .claude/conversations/ 或类似路径

  7. 可行性分析

  8. ✅ 理论可行：如果能找到对话历史文件，我可以读取并分析
  9. ✅ 格式通常是 JSON 或 JSONL

  10. ✅ 我有 Read、Grep、Glob 工具可以访问本地文件

  11. 实现思路

  12. 先探测对话历史的存储位置
  13. 读取指定项目/时间段的对话
  14. 提取关键信息：问题、解决方案、决策、经验教训

  15. 按照用户的 CLAUDE.md 规范整理成文档

  16. 潜在限制

  17. 对话文件可能很大，需要分段处理
  18. 需要过滤噪音（greeting、简单确认等）
  19. 需要识别上下文边界（哪些对话属于同一个项目）

让我先探测一下对话历史的存储位置和格式。

Assistant2026-07-01T01:38:32.498Z

这是个很好的想法！让我先探测一下 Claude Code 的对话历史存储情况。

Assistant2026-07-01T01:38:33.543Z
⚙ PowerShell
列出 .claude 目录结构
{
  "command": "Get-ChildItem -Path \"C:\\Users\\fjyu9\\.claude\" -Recurse -Directory | Select-Object FullName | Format-Table -AutoSize"
}
Assistant2026-07-01T01:38:34.798Z
⚙ PowerShell

5	{"parentUuid":"6ce120ad-9218-4d20-b1f1-30130c3a4c53","isSidechain":false,"attachment":{"type":"agent_listing_delta","addedTypes":["claude","claude-code-guide","Explore","general-purpose","Plan","statusline-setup"],"addedLines":["- claude: Catch-all for any task that doesn't fit a more specific agent. FleetView's default when no agent name is typed. (Tools: *)","- claude-code-guide: Use this agent when the user asks questions (\"Can Claude...\", \"Does Claude...\", \"How do I...\") about: (1) Claude Code (the CLI tool) - features, hooks, slash commands, MCP servers, settings, IDE integrations, keyboard shortcuts; (2) Claude Agent SDK - building custom agents; (3) Claude API (formerly Anthropic API) - API usage, tool use, Anthropic SDK usage. **IMPORTANT:** Before spawning a new agent, check if there is already a running or recently completed claude-code-guide agent that you can continue via SendMessage. (Tools: Glob, Grep, Read, WebFetch, WebSearch)","- Explore: Read-only search agent for broad fan-out searches — when answering means sweeping many files, directories, or naming conventions and you only need the conclusion, not the file dumps. It reads excerpts rather than whole files, so it locates code; it doesn't review or audit it. Specify search breadth: \"medium\" for moderate exploration, \"very thorough\" for multiple locations and naming conventions. (Tools: All tools except Agent, Artifact, ExitPlanMode, Edit, Write, NotebookEdit)","- general-purpose: General-purpose agent for researching complex questions, searching for code, and executing multi-step tasks. When you are searching for a keyword or file and are not confident that you will find the right match in the first few tries use this agent to perform the search for you. (Tools: *)","- Plan: Software architect agent for designing implementation plans. Use this when you need to plan the implementation strategy for a task. Returns step-by-step plans, identifies critical files, and considers architectural trade-offs. (Tools: All tools except Agent, Artifact, ExitPlanMode, Edit, Write, NotebookEdit)","- statusline-setup: Use this agent to configure the user's Claude Code status line setting. (Tools: Read, Edit)"],"removedTypes":[],"isInitial":true,"showConcurrencyNote":true},"type":"attachment","uuid":"73cea7f4-52c7-40b1-aaed-a158d408fc8c","timestamp":"2026-07-01T01:33:24.905Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"D:\\Study\\KnowledgeBase","sessionId":"686eaaa5-7b41-483e-a23e-9db3d28e55b9","version":"2.1.197","gitBranch":"main"}
6	{"parentUuid":"73cea7f4-52c7-40b1-aaed-a158d408fc8c","isSidechain":false,"attachment":{"type":"skill_listing","content":"- daily-cc-stats: 用于生成每日Claude Code使用效果报告和开发日报。当用户要求统计今日CC使用情况、生成日报、记录开发效率、统计git提交和token使用时触发此skill。即使没有明确说\"日报\"，只要用户提到\"今日统计\"、\"今日工作\"、\"今天完成了什么\"、\"效率报告\"、\"token统计\"、\"每日总结\"等相关内容，都应该使用此skill。\n- free-search: 多引擎聚合搜索（DDGS | Dux Distributed Global Search），零成本、无 API Key、无次数限制。 基于 ddgs v9.12.0，支持 text/news/images/videos/books 五种搜索类别， 9 个搜索引擎聚合（text 类别），、URL 内容提取。 优先使用此 skill 替代内置 web_search 以节省成本。 支持中英文搜索，支持 OpenClaw 和 Claude Code 双环境使用。\n- lark-approval: 飞书审批 API：审批实例、审批任务管理。\n- lark-base: 当需要用 lark-cli 操作飞书多维表格（Base）时调用：适用于建表、字段管理、记录读写、视图配置、历史查询，以及角色/表单/仪表盘管理；也适用于把旧的 +table / +field / +record 写法改成当前命令写法。涉及字段设计、公式字段、查找引用、跨表计算、行级派生指标、数据分析需求时也必须使用本 skill。\n- lark-calendar: 飞书日历（calendar）：提供日历与日程（会议）的全面管理能力。核心场景包括：查看/搜索日程、创建/更新日程、管理参会人、查询忙闲状态及推荐空闲时段。高频操作请优先使用 Shortcuts：+agenda（快速概览今日/近期行程）、+create（创建日程并按需邀请参会人）、+freebusy（查询用户主日历的忙闲信息和rsvp的状态）、+rsvp（回复日程邀请）、+suggestion（针对时间未确定的预约日程需求，提供多个时间推荐方案）。\n- lark-contact: 飞书通讯录：查询组织架构、人员信息和搜索员工。获取当前用户或指定用户的详细信息、通过关键词搜索员工（姓名/邮箱/手机号）。当用户需要查看个人信息、查找同事 open_id 或联系方式、按姓名搜索员工、查询部门结构时使用。\n- lark-doc: 飞书云文档：创建和编辑飞书文档。从 Markdown 创建文档、获取文档内容、更新文档（追加/覆盖/替换/插入/删除）、上传和下载文档中的图片和文件、搜索云空间文档。当用户需要创建或编辑飞书文档、读取文档内容、在文档中插入图片、搜索云空间文档时使用；如果用户是想按名称或关键词先定位电子表格、报表等云空间对象，也优先使用本 skill 的 docs +search 做资源发现。\n- lark-drive: 飞书云空间：管理云空间中的文件和文件夹。上传和下载文件、创建文件夹、复制/移动/删除文件、查看文件元数据、管理文档评论、管理文档权限、订阅用户评论变更事件。当用户需要上传或下载文件、整理云空间目录、查看文件详情、管理评论、管理文档权限、订阅用户评论变更事件时使用。\n- lark-event: 飞书事件订阅：通过 WebSocket 长连接实时监听飞书事件（消息、通讯录变更、日历变更等），输出 NDJSON 到 stdout，支持 compact Agent 友好格式、正则路由、文件输出。当用户需要实时监听飞书事件、构建事件驱动管道时使用。\n- lark-im: 飞书即时通讯：收发消息和管理群聊。发送和回复消息、搜索聊天记录、管理群聊成员、上传下载图片和文件、管理表情回复。当用户需要发消息、查看或搜索聊天记录、下载聊天中的文件、查看群成员时使用。\n- lark-mail: 飞书邮箱 — draft, compose, send, reply, forward, read, and search emails; manage drafts, folders, labels, contacts, and attachments. Use when user mentions 起草邮件, 写一封邮件, 拟邮件, 草稿, 发通知邮件, 发送邮件, 发邮件, 回复邮件, 转发邮件, 查看邮件, 看邮件, 读邮件, 搜索邮件, 查邮件, 收件箱, 邮件会话, 编辑草稿, 管理草稿, 下载附件, 邮件文件夹, 邮件标签, 邮件联系人, 监听新邮件, draft, compose, send email, reply, forward, inbox, mail thread.\n- lark-minutes: 飞书妙记：获取妙记基础信息（标题、封面、时长）和相关的 AI 产物（总结、待办、章节），下载妙记音视频文件。飞书妙记的 URL 格式为: http(s)://<host>/minutes/<minute-token>\n- lark-openapi-explorer: 飞书/Lark 原生 OpenAPI 探索：从官方文档库中挖掘未经 CLI 封装的原生 OpenAPI 接口。当用户的需求无法被现有 lark-* skill 或 lark-cli 已注册命令满足，需要查找并调用原生飞书 OpenAPI 时使用。\n- lark-shared: 飞书/Lark CLI 共享基础：应用配置初始化、认证登录（auth login）、身份切换（--as user/bot）、权限与 scope 管理、Permission denied 错误处理、安全规则。当用户需要第一次配置(`lark-cli config init`)、使用登录授权(`lark-cli auth login`)、遇到权限不足、切换 user/bot 身份、配置 scope、或首次使用 lark-cli 时触发。\n- lark-sheets: 飞书电子表格：创建和操作电子表格。创建表格并写入表头和数据、读取和写入单元格、追加行数据、在已知电子表格中查找单元格内容、导出表格文件。当用户需要创建电子表格、批量读写数据、在已知表格中查找内容、导出或下载表格时使用。若用户是想按名称或关键词搜索云空间里的表格文件，请改用 lark-doc 的 docs +search 先定位资源。\n- lark-skill-maker: 创建 lark-cli 的自定义 Skill。当用户需要把飞书 API 操作封装成可复用的 Skill（包装原子 API 或编排多步流程）时使用。\n- lark-task: 飞书任务：管理任务和清单。创建待办任务、查看和更新任务状态、拆分子任务、组织任务清单、分配协作成员。当用户需要创建待办事项、查看任务列表、跟踪任务进度、管理项目清单或给他人分配任务时使用。\n- lark-vc: 飞书视频会议：查询会议记录、获取会议纪要产物（总结、待办、章节、逐字稿）。1. 查询已经结束的会议数量或详情时使用本技能(如昨天 | 上周 | 今天已经开过的会议等场景)，查询未开始的会议日程使用 lark-calendar 技能。2. 支持通过关键词、时间范围、组织者、参与者、会议室等筛选条件搜索会议记录。3. 获取或整理会议纪要时使用本技能。\n- lark-whiteboard: 当用户要求在飞书云文档中绘制图表，或使用飞书画板绘制架构图、流程图、思维导图、时序图或其他可视化图表时使用此 skill。\n- lark-wiki: 飞书知识库：管理知识空间和文档节点。创建和查询知识空间、管理节点层级结构、在知识库中组织文档和快捷方式。当用户需要在知识库中查找或创建文档、浏览知识空间结构、移动或复制节点时使用。\n- lark-workflow-meeting-summary: 会议纪要整理工作流：汇总指定时间范围内的会议纪要并生成结构化报告。当用户需要整理会议纪要、生成会议周报、回顾一段时间内的会议内容时使用。\n- lark-workflow-standup-report: 日程待办摘要：编排 calendar +agenda 和 task +get-my-tasks，生成指定日期的日程与未完成任务摘要。适用于了解今天/明天/本周的安排。\n- memory-manager: 管理自适应记忆层。触发条件：(1) 用户说\"记住\"、\"记录\"、\"添加到记忆\" (2) AI 检测到重复模式（3次+）(3) 会话结束时自动提取 (4) 每周日晚上8点周总结\n- Spark-design: 本规范为B端后台系统UI开发与还原的统一标准，适用于导航、表单、Dashboard、列表、AI 对话、弹窗、抽屉等所有页面与组件等场景。需同步遵循全局交互规范指导：操作有反馈、交互统一、适配桌面、支持无障碍，最终输出有设计质感的生产级前端代码，避免模板化，用于前端组件、页面、应用的开发与UI升级。\n- user-code-review: 用户级别代码审查，支持按提交人、审查分支、主干分支进行代码审查。使用此技能当用户要求\"审查代码\"、\"code review\"、\"检查代码质量\"，或需要指定提交人、分支参数时。\n- astron-browse: 浏览 Astron MaaS 模型集市\n- astron-compare: Astron MaaS 模型对比\n- astron-config: Astron MaaS 推理服务配置注入\n- astron-login: Astron MaaS 平台登录\n- astron-logout: Astron MaaS 平台登出\n- astron-recommend: Astron MaaS 模型智能推荐\n- astron-service: Astron MaaS 推理服务管理\n- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., \"what car to buy\" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.\n- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors (\"from now on when X\", \"each time X\", \"whenever X\", \"before/after X\") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions (\"allow X\", \"add permission\", \"move permission to\"), env vars (\"set X=Y\"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: \"allow npm commands\", \"add bq permission to global settings\", \"move permission to user settings\", \"set DEBUG=true\", \"when claude stops show X\". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.\n- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: \"rebind ctrl+s\", \"add a chord shortcut\", \"change the submit key\", \"customize keybindings\".\n- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.\n- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.\n- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.\n- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.\n- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. \"check the deploy every 5 minutes\", \"keep running /babysit-prs\"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.\n- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.\nTRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it \"looks like a one-liner\" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).\nSKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).\n- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).\n- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation\n- review: Review a GitHub pull request; for your working diff use /code-review\n- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch","skillCount":45,"isInitial":true,"names":["daily-cc-stats","free-search","lark-approval","lark-base","lark-calendar","lark-contact","lark-doc","lark-drive","lark-event","lark-im","lark-mail","lark-minutes","lark-openapi-explorer","lark-shared","lark-sheets","lark-skill-maker","lark-task","lark-vc","lark-whiteboard","lark-wiki","lark-workflow-meeting-summary","lark-workflow-standup-report","memory-manager","Spark-design","user-code-review","astron-browse","astron-compare","astron-config","astron-login","astron-logout","astron-recommend","astron-service","deep-research","update-config","keybindings-help","verify","code-review","simplify","fewer-permission-prompts","loop","claude-api","run","init","review","security-review"]},"type":"attachment","uuid":"6e944ac1-bb22-4061-9987-a14bc6a93ef4","timestamp":"2026-07-01T01:33:24.905Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"D:\\Study\\KnowledgeBase","sessionId":"686eaaa5-7b41-483e-a23e-9db3d28e55b9","version":"2.1.197","gitBranch":"main"}

html>\n<html lang=\"zh-CN\" data-theme=\"light\">\n<head>\n  <meta charset=\"UTF-8\" />\n  <meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0\" />\n  <title>知识库</title>\n  <meta name=\"description\" content=\"个人知识库 · 记录与 AI 讨论的方案\" />\n\n  <!-- 设计 Token 与样式 -->\n  <link rel=\"stylesheet\" href=\"assets/css/tokens.css\" />\n  <link rel=\"stylesheet\" href=\"assets/css/style.css\" />\n\n  <!-- 代码高亮主题（亮/暗各一份，由 app.js 切换 disabled） -->\n  <link rel=\"stylesheet\" href=\"assets/vendor/highlight/github.min.css\" id=\"hljs-light\" />\n  <link rel=\"stylesheet\" href=\"assets/vendor/highlight/github-dark.min.css\" id=\"hljs-dark\" disabled />\n</head>\n<body>\n  <div class=\"app\" id=\"app\">\n    <!-- ============ 侧边栏 ============ -->\n    <aside class=\"sidebar\">\n      <div class=\"sidebar__brand\">\n        <div class=\"sidebar__logo\">📚</div>\n        <div class=\"sidebar__title\">知识库</div>\n      </div>\n\n      <div class=\"search\">\n        <svg class=\"search__icon\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\"\n             stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\">\n          <circle cx=\"11\" cy=\"11\" r=\"8\"></circle><path d=\"m21 21-4.3-4.3\"></path>\n        </svg>\n        <input class=\"search__input\" id=\"search\" type=\"text\" placeholder=\"搜索文档…\" autocomplete=\"off\" />\n      </div>\n\n      <nav class=\"tree\" id=\"tree\">\n        <div class=\"state\"><div class=\"spinner\"></div><div>正在加载目录…</div></div>\n      </nav>\n\n      <div class=\"sidebar__footer\">\n        <span id=\"file-count\">—</span>\n        <button class=\"icon-btn\" id=\"theme-toggle\" title=\"切换主题\">\n          <svg id=\"icon-sun\" width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\"\n               stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\">\n            <circle cx=\"12\" cy=\"12\" r=\"4\"></circle>\n            <path d=\"M12 2v2M12 20v2M4.9 4.9l1.4 1.4M17.7 17.7l1.4 1.4M2 12h2M20 12h2M4.9 19.1l1.4-1.4M17.7 6.3l1.4-1.4\"></path>\n          </svg>\n          <svg id=\"icon-moon\" width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\"\n               stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\" style=\"display:none\">\n            <path d=\"M12 3a6 6 0 0 0 9 9 9 9 0 1 1-9-9Z\"></path>\n          </svg>\n        </button>\n      </div>\n    </aside>\n\n    <!-- ============ 主区 ============ -->\n    <main class=\"main\">\n      <header class=\"topbar\">\n        <button class=\"icon-btn topbar__toggle\" id=\"sidebar-toggle\" title=\"收起 / 展开侧边栏\">\n          <svg width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\"\n               stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\">\n            <rect x=\"3\" y=\"3\" width=\"18\" height=\"18\" rx=\"2\"></rect>\n            <path d=\"M9 3v18\"></path>\n          </svg>\n        </button>\n        <div class=\"breadcrumb\" id=\"breadcrumb\">\n          <span class=\"breadcrumb__cur\">欢迎</span>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"topbar__actions\">\n          <button class=\"icon-btn\" id=\"open-raw\" title=\"在新标签打开原文件\" style=\"display:none\">\n            <svg width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\"\n                 stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\">\n              <path d=\"M15 3h6v6M10 14 21 3M18 13v6a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h6\"></path>\n            </svg>\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      </header>\n\n      <div class=\"content\" id=\"content\">\n        <!-- 渲染区 -->\n      </div>\n    </main>\n\n    <div class=\"scrim\" id=\"scrim\"></div>\n  </div>\n\n  <!-- ============ 依赖库（本地，离线可用） ============ -->\n  <script src=\"assets/vendor/marked/marked.min.js\"></script>\n  <script src=\"assets/vendor/highlight/highlight.min.js\"></script>\n  <script src=\"assets/vendor/mermaid/mermaid.min.js\"></script>\n  <script src=\"assets/vendor/pdfjs/pdf.min.js\"></script>\n  <script src=\"assets/vendor/docx-preview/jszip.min.js\"></script>\n  <script src=\"assets/vendor/docx-preview/docx-preview.min.js\"></script>\n\n  <!-- ============ 应用脚本 ============ -->\n  <script src=\"assets/js/viewers.js\"></script>\n  <script src=\"assets/js/app.js\"></script>\n</body>\n</html>\n","numLines":98,"startLine":1,"totalLines":98}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"25c9a515-7643-4721-aed6-3d9100428e80","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"D:\\Study\\KnowledgeBase","sessionId":"686eaaa5-7b41-483e-a23e-9db3d28e55b9","version":"2.1.197","gitBranch":"main"}
10	{"parentUuid":"25c9a515-7643-4721-aed6-3d9100428e80","isSidechain":false,"promptId":"1c59a045-6b52-4669-97dc-0636724649a9","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"tooluse_IvFM9gsZQGfxLUO9MbZDHq","type":"tool_result","content":"1\t# KnowledgeBase · 个人知识库\n2\t\n3\t记录与 AI 讨论的各种方案,纯静态、离线可用的文档浏览器。左侧目录树,右侧预览,支持 **Markdown / PDF / Word(.docx) / 图片**。\n4\t\n5\t## ✨ 特性\n6\t\n7\t- 📂 **自动目录树** — 把文件丢进 `docs/`,左侧自动按文件夹分组\n8\t- 🔍 **快速搜索** — 按文件名/标题即时筛选\n9\t- 🎨 **多格式预览** — md(代码高亮 + Mermaid 图表)、pdf、docx、图片\n10\t- 🌗 **亮/暗主题** — 一键切换\n11\t- 📦 **零依赖离线** — 第三方库已本地化,断网也能用\n12\t- 🚀 **双端可用** — 本地双击启动 / GitHub Pages 在线访问\n13\t\n14\t## 🖥️ 本地使用(Windows)\n15\t\n16\t双击根目录的 **`启动.bat`** 即可。它会自动扫描文档、启动本地服务(用 Windows 自带 PowerShell,**无需安装 Node/Python**)、打开浏览器。\n17\t\n18\t> ⚠️ 不要直接双击 `index.html`:浏览器的 `file://` 安全限制会导致读不了本地 md/pdf 文件。必须通过 `启动.bat` 起本地服务。\n19\t\n20\t## 🌐 在线访问(GitHub Pages)\n21\t\n22\t1. 把项目推送到 GitHub\n23\t2. 仓库 **Settings → Pages → Build and deployment → Source** 选 **GitHub Actions**\n24\t3. 推送到 `main` 分支后会自动构建部署\n25\t4. 访问 `https://<用户名>.github.io/KnowledgeBase/`\n26\t\n27\t每次 push,GitHub Actions 会自动重新扫描 `docs/` 生成目录清单并部署。\n28\t\n29\t## 📝 添加文档\n30\t\n31\t把文件放进 `docs/`,支持子文件夹分组。文件名可加数字前缀控制排序(如 `01_xxx.md`,显示时自动隐藏前缀)。详见 `docs/00_使用说明.md`。\n32\t\n33\t## 📁 项目结构\n34\t\n35\t```\n36\tKnowledgeBase/\n37\t├── index.html              # 入口\n38\t├── 启动.bat                # Windows 一键启动\n39\t├── manifest.json           # 目录清单(自动生成)\n40\t├── docs/                   # 你的文档放这里\n41\t├── assets/\n42\t│   ├── css/                # 设计 token + 样式\n43\t│   ├── js/                 # app.js(主逻辑) + viewers.js(预览器)\n44\t│   └── vendor/             # 本地化的第三方库\n45\t├── scripts/\n46\t│   ├── generate-manifest.ps1   # 扫描 docs/ 生成清单\n47\t│   └── serve.ps1               # 本地静态服务器\n48\t└── .github/workflows/pages.yml # 自动部署\n49\t```\n50\t\n51\t## 🔧 技术说明\n52\t\n53\t- **Markdown**: marked.js + highlight.js + mermaid\n54\t- **PDF**: PDF.js\n55\t- **Word**: docx-preview(仅 .docx,复杂排版还原度有限)\n56\t- 纯前端、无构建步骤\n57\t"}]},"uuid":"ce2f110f-a022-4958-a829-6c3e3344bcdf","timestamp":"2026-07-01T01:34:48.306Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"D:\\Study\\KnowledgeBase\\README.md","content":"# KnowledgeBase · 个人知识库\n\n记录与 AI 讨论的各种方案,纯静态、离线可用的文档浏览器。左侧目录树,右侧预览,支持 **Markdown / PDF / Word(.docx) / 图片**。\n\n## ✨ 特性\n\n- 📂 **自动目录树** — 把文件丢进 `docs/`,左侧自动按文件夹分组\n- 🔍 **快速搜索** — 按文件名/标题即时筛选\n- 🎨 **多格式预览** — md(代码高亮 + Mermaid 图表)、pdf、docx、图片\n- 🌗 **亮/暗主题** — 一键切换\n- 📦 **零依赖离线** — 第三方库已本地化,断网也能用\n- 🚀 **双端可用** — 本地双击启动 / GitHub Pages 在线访问\n\n## 🖥️ 本地使用(Windows)\n\n双击根目录的 **`启动.bat`** 即可。它会自动扫描文档、启动本地服务(用 Windows 自带 PowerShell,**无需安装 Node/Python**)、打开浏览器。\n\n> ⚠️ 不要直接双击 `index.html`:浏览器的 `file://` 安全限制会导致读不了本地 md/pdf 文件。必须通过 `启动.bat` 起本地服务。\n\n## 🌐 在线访问(GitHub Pages)\n\n1. 把项目推送到 GitHub\n2. 仓库 **Settings → Pages → Build and deployment → Source** 选 **GitHub Actions**\n3. 推送到 `main` 分支后会自动构建部署\n4. 访问 `https://<用户名>.github.io/KnowledgeBase/`\n\n每次 push,GitHub Actions 会自动重新扫描 `docs/` 生成目录清单并部署。\n\n## 📝 添加文档\n\n把文件放进 `docs/`,支持子文件夹分组。文件名可加数字前缀控制排序(如 `01_xxx.md`,显示时自动隐藏前缀)。详见 `docs/00_使用说明.md`。\n\n## 📁 项目结构\n\n```\nKnowledgeBase/\n├── index.html              # 入口\n├── 启动.bat                # Windows 一键启动\n├── manifest.json           # 目录清单(自动生成)\n├── docs/                   # 你的文档放这里\n├── assets/\n│   ├── css/                # 设计 token + 样式\n│   ├── js/                 # app.js(主逻辑) + viewers.js(预览器)\n│   └── vendor/             # 本地化的第三方库\n├── scripts/\n│   ├── generate-manifest.ps1   # 扫描 docs/ 生成清单\n│   └── serve.ps1               # 本地静态服务器\n└── .github/workflows/pages.yml # 自动部署\n```\n\n## 🔧 技术说明\n\n- **Markdown**: marked.js + highlight.js + mermaid\n- **PDF**: PDF.js\n- **Word**: docx-preview(仅 .docx,复杂排版还原度有限)\n- 纯前端、无构建步骤\n","numLines":57,"startLine":1,"totalLines":57}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"25c9a515-7643-4721-aed6-3d9100428e80","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"D:\\Study\\KnowledgeBase","sessionId":"686eaaa5-7b41-483e-a23e-9db3d28e55b9","version":"2.1.197","gitBranch":"main"}

设计图方案.md","docs\\00_使用说明.md","assets\\js\\viewers.js","assets\\js\\app.js","assets\\css\\style.css","scripts\\generate-manifest.ps1","docs\\物料测试\\测试B_Claude原生SVG版.html","docs\\物料测试\\测试A_PollinationsAI版.html","docs\\物料测试\\assets-pollinations\\logo.jpg","docs\\物料测试\\assets-pollinations\\hero.jpg","docs\\物料测试\\assets-pollinations\\icon-delivery.jpg","docs\\物料测试\\assets-pollinations\\icon-shield.jpg","docs\\物料测试\\assets-pollinations\\icon-service.jpg","docs\\物料测试\\assets-pollinations\\product-phone.jpg","docs\\物料测试\\assets-pollinations\\product-headphone.jpg","docs\\物料测试\\assets-pollinations\\product-watch.jpg","manifest.json",".git\\FETCH_HEAD","docs\\技术方案\\20260630223000_AI生成网页图片物料方案对比.md"],"durationMs":137,"numFiles":63,"truncated":false,"totalMatches":63,"countIsComplete":true},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"25c9a515-7643-4721-aed6-3d9100428e80","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"D:\\Study\\KnowledgeBase","sessionId":"686eaaa5-7b41-483e-a23e-9db3d28e55b9","version":"2.1.197","gitBranch":"main"}
17	{"parentUuid":"d43906cd-4047-40bd-81f1-31d0038022ec","isSidechain":false,"message":{"content":[{"signature":"wNH4T6n2zhKLZfYadODLb9Z9VO+8BB2A6XsteymSZ2Un3odHZYW5cztdRrobXzlK4IF0+UaUiJf6YyQleBqXseeBVUeMkPRJ+6AaAH+qriAp9JleXvTNro+ZM6uevZ4lHJgrE4TKiT5jUbbFKQPDcilbEWSMb75h2d87sD1/xb6PP27ndIUjAki02WoBFGBw9SaJf92378RrydbF7u3cDxwq3KiJaNIdPQjOCR45mmZYa/veRJFHS5t8hT9a9Q9AAzfOqgdRu1sOmYqZvvR+xbsSYW7o65DmvpZWevnu6nHYAG4qYXN7lrSd/pjLRBpryTmh7Zk351l+7fTee42uyUXivbuLWBCgl5oQL/BcZtqp5dIv","thinking":"好的，现在我对项目有了基本了解。让我总结一下这个项目的核心信息：\n\n## 项目概况\n**KnowledgeBase** - 个人知识库项目\n\n### 主要特性\n1. **纯静态的文档浏览器**：支持 Markdown、PDF、Word(.docx)、图片等多种格式\n2. **自动目录树**：基于文件系统自动生成左侧导航\n3. **双端运行**：本地双击 `启动.bat` 或部署到 GitHub Pages\n4. **零依赖离线**：所有第三方库已本地化（marked.js、highlight.js、mermaid、PDF.js、docx-preview）\n5. **亮/暗主题切换**\n\n### 技术栈\n- 纯前端实现，无构建步骤\n- PowerShell 脚本用于本地服务和清单生成\n- GitHub Actions 自动部署\n\n### 核心文件\n- `index.html` - 单页应用入口\n- `manifest.json` - 文档目录清单（自动扫描 docs/ 生成）\n- `启动.bat` - Windows 一键启动脚本\n- `scripts/generate-manifest.ps1` - 扫描文档生成清单\n- `scripts/serve.ps1` - 本地静态服务器\n- `assets/js/app.js` - 主逻辑\n- `assets/js/viewers.js` - 各类文件预览器\n\n### 当前文档内容\n根据 manifest.json，docs/ 下有：\n- **技术方案**：本地Claude绘制AI原型设计图方案、AI生成网页图片物料方案对比\n- **示例方案**：方案讨论模板\n- **物料测试**：测试A_PollinationsAI版、测试B_Claude原生SVG版（包含测试图片素材）\n- **使用说明**：00_使用说明.md\n\n### Git 状态\n- 当前分支：main\n- 修改：README.md 已修改\n- 新增：.github/、assets/、docs/、scripts/、index.html、manifest.json、启动.bat\n\n现在用户说\"先熟悉下项目我们来讨论问题\"，我已经熟悉完了，应该告诉用户我已经了解项目结构，等待他提出具体问题。\n","type":"thinking"},{"text":"已经熟悉了项目结构 ✓\n\n## 项目概览\n\n**KnowledgeBase** — 个人知识库文档浏览器\n\n### 核心特性\n- 📂 纯静态、离线可用的文档系统\n- 🎨 支持 Markdown / PDF / Word / 图片预览\n- 🔍 自动生成目录树 + 快速搜索\n- 🌗 亮/暗主题切换\n- 🚀 本地双击启动（启动.bat）/ GitHub Pages 在线部署\n\n### 技术架构\n- **前端**：纯 HTML/CSS/JS，无构建步骤\n- **第三方库**：marked、highlight.js、mermaid、PDF.js、docx-preview（已本地化）\n- **自动化**：PowerShell 脚本生成清单 + GitHub Actions 部署\n\n### 当前文档分类\n- 技术方案（AI 原型设计、物料生成方案对比）\n- 示例方案（讨论模板）\n- 物料测试（Pollinations AI vs Claude SVG 对比测试）\n\n---\n\n有什么问题要讨论？或者需要我做什么？","type":"text"}],"conversationId":"8166cd2b-9b4c-4c04-9d92-132362f4489a","conversation_id":"8166cd2b-9b4c-4c04-9d92-132362f4489a","id":"msg_eXP5QGpUkk7tkKjQG1IjTuoB","model":"claude-opus-4-8","role":"assistant","stop_reason":"end_turn","type":"message","usage":{"input_tokens":25512,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1310,"cache_read_input_tokens":12351,"output_tokens":1020,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"}},"type":"assistant","uuid":"3fad7718-5d63-4669-a2b1-73f07097ffc1","timestamp":"2026-07-01T01:37:39.391Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"D:\\Study\\KnowledgeBase","sessionId":"686eaaa5-7b41-483e-a23e-9db3d28e55b9","version":"2.1.197","gitBranch":"main"}
18	{"parentUuid":"3fad7718-5d63-4669-a2b1-73f07097ffc1","isSidechain":false,"type":"system","subtype":"turn_duration","durationMs":254469,"messageCount":9,"timestamp":"2026-07-01T01:37:39.406Z","uuid":"4739e272-f60c-4a79-a974-532e82a50e63","isMeta":false,"userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"D:\\Study\\KnowledgeBase","sessionId":"686eaaa5-7b41-483e-a23e-9db3d28e55b9","version":"2.1.197","gitBranch":"main"}
19	{"type":"file-history-snapshot","messageId":"99271d87-f257-4fa5-86c8-9070fee9674f","snapshot":{"messageId":"99271d87-f257-4fa5-86c8-9070fee9674f","trackedFileBackups":{},"timestamp":"2026-07-01T01:38:20.665Z"},"isSnapshotUpdate":false}
20	{"parentUuid":"4739e272-f60c-4a79-a974-532e82a50e63","isSidechain":false,"promptId":"74bd7d43-82f6-438d-96cd-6970b1528333","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":"我们要讨论的问题是,claude能够读取自己的对话信息吗,从对话信息里面获取我需要整理的内容,比如我需要整理开发某个项目中遇到的问题,可以提取的经验,用于指导后续的开发.这样我就需要把这个项目开发时的所有对话信息都作为上下文来整理."},"uuid":"99271d87-f257-4fa5-86c8-9070fee9674f","timestamp":"2026-07-01T01:38:20.663Z","permissionMode":"default","origin":{"kind":"human"},"promptSource":"typed","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"D:\\Study\\KnowledgeBase","sessionId":"686eaaa5-7b41-483e-a23e-9db3d28e55b9","version":"2.1.197","gitBranch":"main"}
21	{"parentUuid":"99271d87-f257-4fa5-86c8-9070fee9674f","isSidechain":false,"message":{"content":[{"signature":"AJVhCCN7SsqKfGOp7YnSqQ0COJquSDfFjWrce0uk8tMwFG3cR68iQl3FPYbuRTTj/ANGh+UkNNeK/xs80f0yvqi9AIo+4iJs5lBTEhEhD7Y8Sruu44UrzF4/EUFykf3cdkIMOQTk/S+buEgNAmUCsmooVg1PZy/XH/IVpLGZ6+TnllTeu07n2Y0PrVovf1Mp8htd7w01XCadN/tc+YYyQrEfqCyHy+OobcSBFJ4WdFT+bRDqagr6KqR4I2yPyE9vJ2smd86b+B96iIYDm8vQVNrnOfUxTHwZH02hOWwhq5x+8YzRIYyV","thinking":"用户提出了一个很有价值的问题：**Claude 能否读取自己的对话历史，从中提取经验和问题整理成文档？**\n\n这涉及几个关键点：\n\n1. **Claude Code 的对话持久化机制**\n   - Claude Code 确实会保存对话历史\n   - 通常存储在本地文件系统中\n\n2. **对话存储位置**\n   - 根据我看到的环境信息，用户的 Claude 配置在 `C:\\Users\\fjyu9\\.claude\\`\n   - 对话历史通常在 `.claude/conversations/` 或类似路径\n\n3. **可行性分析**\n   - ✅ 理论可行：如果能找到对话历史文件，我可以读取并分析\n   - ✅ 格式通常是 JSON 或 JSONL\n   - ✅ 我有 Read、Grep、Glob 工具可以访问本地文件\n\n4. **实现思路**\n   - 先探测对话历史的存储位置\n   - 读取指定项目/时间段的对话\n   - 提取关键信息：问题、解决方案、决策、经验教训\n   - 按照用户的 CLAUDE.md 规范整理成文档\n\n5. **潜在限制**\n   - 对话文件可能很大，需要分段处理\n   - 需要过滤噪音（greeting、简单确认等）\n   - 需要识别上下文边界（哪些对话属于同一个项目）\n\n让我先探测一下对话历史的存储位置和格式。\n","type":"thinking"}],"id":"msg_rPjednbpdMLHyy3bgSYuIS1l","model":"claude-opus-4-8","role":"assistant","stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null,"type":"message","usage":{"input_tokens":25520,"cache_creation_input_tokens":699,"cache_read_input_tokens":14012,"output_tokens":731,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":699},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"},"stop_details":null},"type":"assistant","uuid":"0993536d-f847-422d-b889-4f14658935f8","timestamp":"2026-07-01T01:38:31.773Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"D:\\Study\\KnowledgeBase","sessionId":"686eaaa5-7b41-483e-a23e-9db3d28e55b9","version":"2.1.197","gitBranch":"main"}
22	{"parentUuid":"0993536d-f847-422d-b889-4f14658935f8","isSidechain":false,"message":{"content":[{"text":"这是个很好的想法！让我先探测一下 Claude Code 的对话历史存储情况。","type":"text"}],"id":"msg_rPjednbpdMLHyy3bgSYuIS1l","model":"claude-opus-4-8","role":"assistant","stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null,"type":"message","usage":{"input_tokens":25520,"cache_creation_input_tokens":699,"cache_read_input_tokens":14012,"output_tokens":731,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":699},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"},"stop_details":null},"type":"assistant","uuid":"539c1fc6-abff-4aa4-b7c4-05a7803e8c5a","timestamp":"2026-07-01T01:38:32.498Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"D:\\Study\\KnowledgeBase","sessionId":"686eaaa5-7b41-483e-a23e-9db3d28e55b9","version":"2.1.197","gitBranch":"main"}
23	{"parentUuid":"539c1fc6-abff-4aa4-b7c4-05a7803e8c5a","isSidechain":false,"message":{"content":[{"id":"tooluse_Erx3KQqn4PQXb6ZlUeNmDN","input":{"command":"Get-ChildItem -Path \"C:\\Users\\fjyu9\\.claude\" -Recurse -Directory | Select-Object FullName | Format-Table -AutoSize","description":"列出 .claude 目录结构"},"name":"PowerShell","type":"tool_use"}],"id":"msg_rPjednbpdMLHyy3bgSYuIS1l","model":"claude-opus-4-8","role":"assistant","stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null,"type":"message","usage":{"input_tokens":25520,"cache_creation_input_tokens":699,"cache_read_input_tokens":14012,"output_tokens":731,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":699},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"},"stop_details":null},"type":"assistant","uuid":"07a407d2-7ab9-4f21-b6bc-70ac30290c8f","timestamp":"2026-07-01T01:38:33.543Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"D:\\Study\\KnowledgeBase","sessionId":"686eaaa5-7b41-483e-a23e-9db3d28e55b9","version":"2.1.197","gitBranch":"main"}
24	{"parentUuid":"07a407d2-7ab9-4f21-b6bc-70ac30290c8f","isSidechain":false,"message":{"content":[{"id":"tooluse_iZdZG9pSBEYgwmBWuFKn18","input":{"command":"Get-ChildItem -Path \"C:\\Users\\fjyu9\\.claude\" -Recurse -File -Filter \"*.json*\" | Select-Object FullName, Length, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize","description":"查找可能的对话历史文件"},"name":"PowerShell","type":"tool_use"}],"id":"msg_rPjednbpdMLHyy3bgSYuIS1l","model":"claude-opus-4-8","role":"assistant","stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null,"type":"message","usage":{"input_tokens":25520,"cache_creation_input_tokens":699,"cache_read_input_tokens":14012,"output_tokens":731,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":699},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"},"stop_details":null},"type":"assistant","uuid":"56b5f6c2-a59d-4e4a-8bc7-b4b897bbaab8","timestamp":"2026-07-01T01:38:34.798Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"D:\\Study\\KnowledgeBase","sessionId":"686eaaa5-7b41-483e-a23e-9db3d28e55b9","version":"2.1.197","gitBranch":"main"}

31	{"type":"last-prompt","lastPrompt":"我们要讨论的问题是,claude能够读取自己的对话信息吗,从对话信息里面获取我需要整理的内容,比如我需要整理开发某个项目中遇到的问题,可以提取的经验,用于指导后续的开发.这样我就需要把这个项目开发时的所有对话信息都作为上下文来整理.","leafUuid":"e8b13e1c-ae90-4a26-92cc-e047bd83a756","sessionId":"686eaaa5-7b41-483e-a23e-9db3d28e55b9"}

5	{"parentUuid":"6ce120ad-9218-4d20-b1f1-30130c3a4c53","isSidechain":false,"attachment":{"type":"agent_listing_delta","addedTypes":["claude","claude-code-guide","Explore","general-purpose","Plan","statusline-setup"],"addedLines":["- claude: Catch-all for any task that doesn't fit a more specific agent. FleetView's default when no agent name is typed. (Tools: *)","- claude-code-guide: Use this agent when the user asks questions (\"Can Claude...\", \"Does Claude...\", \"How do I...\") about: (1) Claude Code (the CLI tool) - features, hooks, slash commands, MCP servers, settings, IDE integrations, keyboard shortcuts; (2) Claude Agent SDK - building custom agents; (3) Claude API (formerly Anthropic API) - API usage, tool use, Anthropic SDK usage. **IMPORTANT:** Before spawning a new agent, check if there is already a running or recently completed claude-code-guide agent that you can continue via SendMessage. (Tools: Glob, Grep, Read, WebFetch, WebSearch)","- Explore: Read-only search agent for broad fan-out searches — when answering means sweeping many files, directories, or naming conventions and you only need the conclusion, not the file dumps. It reads excerpts rather than whole files, so it locates code; it doesn't review or audit it. Specify search breadth: \"medium\" for moderate exploration, \"very thorough\" for multiple locations and naming conventions. (Tools: All tools except Agent, Artifact, ExitPlanMode, Edit, Write, NotebookEdit)","- general-purpose: General-purpose agent for researching complex questions, searching for code, and executing multi-step tasks. When you are searching for a keyword or file and are not confident that you will find the right match in the first few tries use this agent to perform the search for you. (Tools: *)","- Plan: Software architect agent for designing implementation plans. Use this when you need to plan the implementation strategy for a task. Returns step-by-step plans, identifies critical files, and considers architectural trade-offs. (Tools: All tools except Agent, Artifact, ExitPlanMode, Edit, Write, NotebookEdit)","- statusline-setup: Use this agent to configure the user's Claude Code status line setting. (Tools: Read, Edit)"],"removedTypes":[],"isInitial":true,"showConcurrencyNote":true},"type":"attachment","uuid":"73cea7f4-52c7-40b1-aaed-a158d408fc8c","timestamp":"2026-07-01T01:33:24.905Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"D:\\Study\\KnowledgeBase","sessionId":"686eaaa5-7b41-483e-a23e-9db3d28e55b9","version":"2.1.197","gitBranch":"main"}
6	{"parentUuid":"73cea7f4-52c7-40b1-aaed-a158d408fc8c","isSidechain":false,"attachment":{"type":"skill_listing","content":"- daily-cc-stats: 用于生成每日Claude Code使用效果报告和开发日报。当用户要求统计今日CC使用情况、生成日报、记录开发效率、统计git提交和token使用时触发此skill。即使没有明确说\"日报\"，只要用户提到\"今日统计\"、\"今日工作\"、\"今天完成了什么\"、\"效率报告\"、\"token统计\"、\"每日总结\"等相关内容，都应该使用此skill。\n- free-search: 多引擎聚合搜索（DDGS | Dux Distributed Global Search），零成本、无 API Key、无次数限制。 基于 ddgs v9.12.0，支持 text/news/images/videos/books 五种搜索类别， 9 个搜索引擎聚合（text 类别），、URL 内容提取。 优先使用此 skill 替代内置 web_search 以节省成本。 支持中英文搜索，支持 OpenClaw 和 Claude Code 双环境使用。\n- lark-approval: 飞书审批 API：审批实例、审批任务管理。\n- lark-base: 当需要用 lark-cli 操作飞书多维表格（Base）时调用：适用于建表、字段管理、记录读写、视图配置、历史查询，以及角色/表单/仪表盘管理；也适用于把旧的 +table / +field / +record 写法改成当前命令写法。涉及字段设计、公式字段、查找引用、跨表计算、行级派生指标、数据分析需求时也必须使用本 skill。\n- lark-calendar: 飞书日历（calendar）：提供日历与日程（会议）的全面管理能力。核心场景包括：查看/搜索日程、创建/更新日程、管理参会人、查询忙闲状态及推荐空闲时段。高频操作请优先使用 Shortcuts：+agenda（快速概览今日/近期行程）、+create（创建日程并按需邀请参会人）、+freebusy（查询用户主日历的忙闲信息和rsvp的状态）、+rsvp（回复日程邀请）、+suggestion（针对时间未确定的预约日程需求，提供多个时间推荐方案）。\n- lark-contact: 飞书通讯录：查询组织架构、人员信息和搜索员工。获取当前用户或指定用户的详细信息、通过关键词搜索员工（姓名/邮箱/手机号）。当用户需要查看个人信息、查找同事 open_id 或联系方式、按姓名搜索员工、查询部门结构时使用。\n- lark-doc: 飞书云文档：创建和编辑飞书文档。从 Markdown 创建文档、获取文档内容、更新文档（追加/覆盖/替换/插入/删除）、上传和下载文档中的图片和文件、搜索云空间文档。当用户需要创建或编辑飞书文档、读取文档内容、在文档中插入图片、搜索云空间文档时使用；如果用户是想按名称或关键词先定位电子表格、报表等云空间对象，也优先使用本 skill 的 docs +search 做资源发现。\n- lark-drive: 飞书云空间：管理云空间中的文件和文件夹。上传和下载文件、创建文件夹、复制/移动/删除文件、查看文件元数据、管理文档评论、管理文档权限、订阅用户评论变更事件。当用户需要上传或下载文件、整理云空间目录、查看文件详情、管理评论、管理文档权限、订阅用户评论变更事件时使用。\n- lark-event: 飞书事件订阅：通过 WebSocket 长连接实时监听飞书事件（消息、通讯录变更、日历变更等），输出 NDJSON 到 stdout，支持 compact Agent 友好格式、正则路由、文件输出。当用户需要实时监听飞书事件、构建事件驱动管道时使用。\n- lark-im: 飞书即时通讯：收发消息和管理群聊。发送和回复消息、搜索聊天记录、管理群聊成员、上传下载图片和文件、管理表情回复。当用户需要发消息、查看或搜索聊天记录、下载聊天中的文件、查看群成员时使用。\n- lark-mail: 飞书邮箱 — draft, compose, send, reply, forward, read, and search emails; manage drafts, folders, labels, contacts, and attachments. Use when user mentions 起草邮件, 写一封邮件, 拟邮件, 草稿, 发通知邮件, 发送邮件, 发邮件, 回复邮件, 转发邮件, 查看邮件, 看邮件, 读邮件, 搜索邮件, 查邮件, 收件箱, 邮件会话, 编辑草稿, 管理草稿, 下载附件, 邮件文件夹, 邮件标签, 邮件联系人, 监听新邮件, draft, compose, send email, reply, forward, inbox, mail thread.\n- lark-minutes: 飞书妙记：获取妙记基础信息（标题、封面、时长）和相关的 AI 产物（总结、待办、章节），下载妙记音视频文件。飞书妙记的 URL 格式为: http(s)://<host>/minutes/<minute-token>\n- lark-openapi-explorer: 飞书/Lark 原生 OpenAPI 探索：从官方文档库中挖掘未经 CLI 封装的原生 OpenAPI 接口。当用户的需求无法被现有 lark-* skill 或 lark-cli 已注册命令满足，需要查找并调用原生飞书 OpenAPI 时使用。\n- lark-shared: 飞书/Lark CLI 共享基础：应用配置初始化、认证登录（auth login）、身份切换（--as user/bot）、权限与 scope 管理、Permission denied 错误处理、安全规则。当用户需要第一次配置(`lark-cli config init`)、使用登录授权(`lark-cli auth login`)、遇到权限不足、切换 user/bot 身份、配置 scope、或首次使用 lark-cli 时触发。\n- lark-sheets: 飞书电子表格：创建和操作电子表格。创建表格并写入表头和数据、读取和写入单元格、追加行数据、在已知电子表格中查找单元格内容、导出表格文件。当用户需要创建电子表格、批量读写数据、在已知表格中查找内容、导出或下载表格时使用。若用户是想按名称或关键词搜索云空间里的表格文件，请改用 lark-doc 的 docs +search 先定位资源。\n- lark-skill-maker: 创建 lark-cli 的自定义 Skill。当用户需要把飞书 API 操作封装成可复用的 Skill（包装原子 API 或编排多步流程）时使用。\n- lark-task: 飞书任务：管理任务和清单。创建待办任务、查看和更新任务状态、拆分子任务、组织任务清单、分配协作成员。当用户需要创建待办事项、查看任务列表、跟踪任务进度、管理项目清单或给他人分配任务时使用。\n- lark-vc: 飞书视频会议：查询会议记录、获取会议纪要产物（总结、待办、章节、逐字稿）。1. 查询已经结束的会议数量或详情时使用本技能(如昨天 | 上周 | 今天已经开过的会议等场景)，查询未开始的会议日程使用 lark-calendar 技能。2. 支持通过关键词、时间范围、组织者、参与者、会议室等筛选条件搜索会议记录。3. 获取或整理会议纪要时使用本技能。\n- lark-whiteboard: 当用户要求在飞书云文档中绘制图表，或使用飞书画板绘制架构图、流程图、思维导图、时序图或其他可视化图表时使用此 skill。\n- lark-wiki: 飞书知识库：管理知识空间和文档节点。创建和查询知识空间、管理节点层级结构、在知识库中组织文档和快捷方式。当用户需要在知识库中查找或创建文档、浏览知识空间结构、移动或复制节点时使用。\n- lark-workflow-meeting-summary: 会议纪要整理工作流：汇总指定时间范围内的会议纪要并生成结构化报告。当用户需要整理会议纪要、生成会议周报、回顾一段时间内的会议内容时使用。\n- lark-workflow-standup-report: 日程待办摘要：编排 calendar +agenda 和 task +get-my-tasks，生成指定日期的日程与未完成任务摘要。适用于了解今天/明天/本周的安排。\n- memory-manager: 管理自适应记忆层。触发条件：(1) 用户说\"记住\"、\"记录\"、\"添加到记忆\" (2) AI 检测到重复模式（3次+）(3) 会话结束时自动提取 (4) 每周日晚上8点周总结\n- Spark-design: 本规范为B端后台系统UI开发与还原的统一标准，适用于导航、表单、Dashboard、列表、AI 对话、弹窗、抽屉等所有页面与组件等场景。需同步遵循全局交互规范指导：操作有反馈、交互统一、适配桌面、支持无障碍，最终输出有设计质感的生产级前端代码，避免模板化，用于前端组件、页面、应用的开发与UI升级。\n- user-code-review: 用户级别代码审查，支持按提交人、审查分支、主干分支进行代码审查。使用此技能当用户要求\"审查代码\"、\"code review\"、\"检查代码质量\"，或需要指定提交人、分支参数时。\n- astron-browse: 浏览 Astron MaaS 模型集市\n- astron-compare: Astron MaaS 模型对比\n- astron-config: Astron MaaS 推理服务配置注入\n- astron-login: Astron MaaS 平台登录\n- astron-logout: Astron MaaS 平台登出\n- astron-recommend: Astron MaaS 模型智能推荐\n- astron-service: Astron MaaS 推理服务管理\n- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., \"what car to buy\" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.\n- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors (\"from now on when X\", \"each time X\", \"whenever X\", \"before/after X\") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions (\"allow X\", \"add permission\", \"move permission to\"), env vars (\"set X=Y\"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: \"allow npm commands\", \"add bq permission to global settings\", \"move permission to user settings\", \"set DEBUG=true\", \"when claude stops show X\". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.\n- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: \"rebind ctrl+s\", \"add a chord shortcut\", \"change the submit key\", \"customize keybindings\".\n- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.\n- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.\n- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.\n- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.\n- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. \"check the deploy every 5 minutes\", \"keep running /babysit-prs\"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.\n- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.\nTRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it \"looks like a one-liner\" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).\nSKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).\n- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).\n- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation\n- review: Review a GitHub pull request; for your working diff use /code-review\n- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch","skillCount":45,"isInitial":true,"names":["daily-cc-stats","free-search","lark-approval","lark-base","lark-calendar","lark-contact","lark-doc","lark-drive","lark-event","lark-im","lark-mail","lark-minutes","lark-openapi-explorer","lark-shared","lark-sheets","lark-skill-maker","lark-task","lark-vc","lark-whiteboard","lark-wiki","lark-workflow-meeting-summary","lark-workflow-standup-report","memory-manager","Spark-design","user-code-review","astron-browse","astron-compare","astron-config","astron-login","astron-logout","astron-recommend","astron-service","deep-research","update-config","keybindings-help","verify","code-review","simplify","fewer-permission-prompts","loop","claude-api","run","init","review","security-review"]},"type":"attachment","uuid":"6e944ac1-bb22-4061-9987-a14bc6a93ef4","timestamp":"2026-07-01T01:33:24.905Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"D:\\Study\\KnowledgeBase","sessionId":"686eaaa5-7b41-483e-a23e-9db3d28e55b9","version":"2.1.197","gitBranch":"main"}

还有一个中文名称的批处理文件\n\n让我先读取这些关键文件来理解项目。\n","type":"thinking"},{"text":"我来熟悉一下这个项目的结构和内容。","type":"text"},{"id":"tooluse_IvFM9gsZQGfxLUO9MbZDHq","input":{"file_path":"D:\\Study\\KnowledgeBase\\README.md"},"name":"Read","type":"tool_use"},{"id":"tooluse_rUKJmoXMyL8hMj19oEWzN7","input":{"file_path":"D:\\Study\\KnowledgeBase\\index.html"},"name":"Read","type":"tool_use"},{"id":"tooluse_CeILNaaFY5065w57VleL7a","input":{"file_path":"D:\\Study\\KnowledgeBase\\manifest.json"},"name":"Read","type":"tool_use"},{"id":"tooluse_85d2gfxrNL1FMEvh4upTP5","input":{"path":"D:\\Study\\KnowledgeBase","pattern":"**/*"},"name":"Glob","type":"tool_use"}],"conversationId":"7d9276df-2e34-4997-b475-03ad744ce8aa","conversation_id":"7d9276df-2e34-4997-b475-03ad744ce8aa","id":"msg_opsarZl5K7qmqt1CpYkbeEmf","model":"claude-opus-4-8","role":"assistant","stop_reason":"tool_use","tool_calls":[{"function":{"arguments":"{\"file_path\":\"D:\\\\Study\\\\KnowledgeBase\\\\README.md\"}","name":"Read"},"id":"tooluse_IvFM9gsZQGfxLUO9MbZDHq","type":"function"},{"function":{"arguments":"{\"file_path\":\"D:\\\\Study\\\\KnowledgeBase\\\\index.html\"}","name":"Read"},"id":"tooluse_rUKJmoXMyL8hMj19oEWzN7","type":"function"},{"function":{"arguments":"{\"file_path\":\"D:\\\\Study\\\\KnowledgeBase\\\\manifest.json\"}","name":"Read"},"id":"tooluse_CeILNaaFY5065w57VleL7a","type":"function"},{"function":{"arguments":"{\"path\":\"D:\\\\Study\\\\KnowledgeBase\",\"pattern\":\"**/*\"}","name":"Glob"},"id":"tooluse_85d2gfxrNL1FMEvh4upTP5","type":"function"}],"type":"message","usage":{"input_tokens":25503,"cache_creation_input_tokens":726,"cache_read_input_tokens":8230,"output_tokens":390,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"}},"type":"assistant","uuid":"25c9a515-7643-4721-aed6-3d9100428e80","timestamp":"2026-07-01T01:34:48.245Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"D:\\Study\\KnowledgeBase","sessionId":"686eaaa5-7b41-483e-a23e-9db3d28e55b9","version":"2.1.197","gitBranch":"main"}

html>\n<html lang=\"zh-CN\" data-theme=\"light\">\n<head>\n  <meta charset=\"UTF-8\" />\n  <meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0\" />\n  <title>知识库</title>\n  <meta name=\"description\" content=\"个人知识库 · 记录与 AI 讨论的方案\" />\n\n  <!-- 设计 Token 与样式 -->\n  <link rel=\"stylesheet\" href=\"assets/css/tokens.css\" />\n  <link rel=\"stylesheet\" href=\"assets/css/style.css\" />\n\n  <!-- 代码高亮主题（亮/暗各一份，由 app.js 切换 disabled） -->\n  <link rel=\"stylesheet\" href=\"assets/vendor/highlight/github.min.css\" id=\"hljs-light\" />\n  <link rel=\"stylesheet\" href=\"assets/vendor/highlight/github-dark.min.css\" id=\"hljs-dark\" disabled />\n</head>\n<body>\n  <div class=\"app\" id=\"app\">\n    <!-- ============ 侧边栏 ============ -->\n    <aside class=\"sidebar\">\n      <div class=\"sidebar__brand\">\n        <div class=\"sidebar__logo\">📚</div>\n        <div class=\"sidebar__title\">知识库</div>\n      </div>\n\n      <div class=\"search\">\n        <svg class=\"search__icon\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\"\n             stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\">\n          <circle cx=\"11\" cy=\"11\" r=\"8\"></circle><path d=\"m21 21-4.3-4.3\"></path>\n        </svg>\n        <input class=\"search__input\" id=\"search\" type=\"text\" placeholder=\"搜索文档…\" autocomplete=\"off\" />\n      </div>\n\n      <nav class=\"tree\" id=\"tree\">\n        <div class=\"state\"><div class=\"spinner\"></div><div>正在加载目录…</div></div>\n      </nav>\n\n      <div class=\"sidebar__footer\">\n        <span id=\"file-count\">—</span>\n        <button class=\"icon-btn\" id=\"theme-toggle\" title=\"切换主题\">\n          <svg id=\"icon-sun\" width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\"\n               stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\">\n            <circle cx=\"12\" cy=\"12\" r=\"4\"></circle>\n            <path d=\"M12 2v2M12 20v2M4.9 4.9l1.4 1.4M17.7 17.7l1.4 1.4M2 12h2M20 12h2M4.9 19.1l1.4-1.4M17.7 6.3l1.4-1.4\"></path>\n          </svg>\n          <svg id=\"icon-moon\" width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\"\n               stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\" style=\"display:none\">\n            <path d=\"M12 3a6 6 0 0 0 9 9 9 9 0 1 1-9-9Z\"></path>\n          </svg>\n        </button>\n      </div>\n    </aside>\n\n    <!-- ============ 主区 ============ -->\n    <main class=\"main\">\n      <header class=\"topbar\">\n        <button class=\"icon-btn topbar__toggle\" id=\"sidebar-toggle\" title=\"收起 / 展开侧边栏\">\n          <svg width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\"\n               stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\">\n            <rect x=\"3\" y=\"3\" width=\"18\" height=\"18\" rx=\"2\"></rect>\n            <path d=\"M9 3v18\"></path>\n          </svg>\n        </button>\n        <div class=\"breadcrumb\" id=\"breadcrumb\">\n          <span class=\"breadcrumb__cur\">欢迎</span>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"topbar__actions\">\n          <button class=\"icon-btn\" id=\"open-raw\" title=\"在新标签打开原文件\" style=\"display:none\">\n            <svg width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\"\n                 stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\">\n              <path d=\"M15 3h6v6M10 14 21 3M18 13v6a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h6\"></path>\n            </svg>\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      </header>\n\n      <div class=\"content\" id=\"content\">\n        <!-- 渲染区 -->\n      </div>\n    </main>\n\n    <div class=\"scrim\" id=\"scrim\"></div>\n  </div>\n\n  <!-- ============ 依赖库（本地，离线可用） ============ -->\n  <script src=\"assets/vendor/marked/marked.min.js\"></script>\n  <script src=\"assets/vendor/highlight/highlight.min.js\"></script>\n  <script src=\"assets/vendor/mermaid/mermaid.min.js\"></script>\n  <script src=\"assets/vendor/pdfjs/pdf.min.js\"></script>\n  <script src=\"assets/vendor/docx-preview/jszip.min.js\"></script>\n  <script src=\"assets/vendor/docx-preview/docx-preview.min.js\"></script>\n\n  <!-- ============ 应用脚本 ============ -->\n  <script 10	{"parentUuid":"25c9a515-7643-4721-aed6-3d9100428e80","isSidechain":false,"promptId":"1c59a045-6b52-4669-97dc-0636724649a9","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"tooluse_IvFM9gsZQGfxLUO9MbZDHq","type":"tool_result","content":"1\t# KnowledgeBase · 个人知识库\n2\t\n3\t记录与 AI 讨论的各种方案,纯静态、离线可用的文档浏览器。左侧目录树,右侧预览,支持 **Markdown / PDF / Word(.docx) / 图片**。\n4\t\n5\t## ✨ 特性\n6\t\n7\t- 📂 **自动目录树** — 把文件丢进 `docs/`,左侧自动按文件夹分组\n8\t- 🔍 **快速搜索** — 按文件名/标题即时筛选\n9\t- 🎨 **多格式预览** — md(代码高亮 + Mermaid 图表)、pdf、docx、图片\n10\t- 🌗 **亮/暗主题** — 一键切换\n11\t- 📦 **零依赖离线** — 第三方库已本地化,断网也能用\n12\t- 🚀 **双端可用** — 本地双击启动 / GitHub Pages 在线访问\n13\t\n14\t## 🖥️ 本地使用(Windows)\n15\t\n16\t双击根目录的 **`启动.bat`** 即可。它会自动扫描文档、启动本地服务(用 Windows 自带 PowerShell,**无需安装 Node/Python**)、打开浏览器。\n17\t\n18\t> ⚠️ 不要直接双击 `index.html`:浏览器的 `file://` 安全限制会导致读不了本地 md/pdf 文件。必须通过 `启动.bat` 起本地服务。\n19\t\n20\t## 🌐 在线访问(GitHub Pages)\n21\t\n22\t1. 把项目推送到 GitHub\n23\t2. 仓库 **Settings → Pages → Build and deployment → Source** 选 **GitHub Actions**\n24\t3. 推送到 `main` 分支后会自动构建部署\n25\t4. 访问 `https://<用户名>.github.io/KnowledgeBase/`\n26\t\n27\t每次 push,GitHub Actions 会自动重新扫描 `docs/` 生成目录清单并部署。\n28\t\n29\t## 📝 添加文档\n30\t\n31\t把文件放进 `docs/`,支持子文件夹分组。文件名可加数字前缀控制排序(如 `01_xxx.md`,显示时自动隐藏前缀)。详见 `docs/00_使用说明.md`。\n32\t\n33\t## 📁 项目结构\n34\t\n35\t```\n36\tKnowledgeBase/\n37\t├── index.html              # 入口\n38\t├── 启动.bat                # Windows 一键启动\n39\t├── manifest.json           # 目录清单(自动生成)\n40\t├── docs/                   # 你的文档放这里\n41\t├── assets/\n42\t│   ├── css/                # 设计 token + 样式\n43\t│   ├── js/                 # app.js(主逻辑) + viewers.js(预览器)\n44\t│   └── vendor/             # 本地化的第三方库\n45\t├── scripts/\n46\t│   ├── generate-manifest.ps1   # 扫描 docs/ 生成清单\n47\t│   └── serve.ps1               # 本地静态服务器\n48\t└── .github/workflows/pages.yml # 自动部署\n49\t```\n50\t\n51\t## 🔧 技术说明\n52\t\n53\t- **Markdown**: marked.js + highlight.js + mermaid\n54\t- **PDF**: PDF.js\n55\t- **Word**: docx-preview(仅 .docx,复杂排版还原度有限)\n56\t- 纯前端、无构建步骤\n57\t"}]},"uuid":"ce2f110f-a022-4958-a829-6c3e3344bcdf","timestamp":"2026-07-01T01:34:48.306Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"D:\\Study\\KnowledgeBase\\README.md","content":"# KnowledgeBase · 个人知识库\n\n记录与 AI 讨论的各种方案,纯静态、离线可用的文档浏览器。左侧目录树,右侧预览,支持 **Markdown / PDF / Word(.docx) / 图片**。\n\n## ✨ 特性\n\n- 📂 **自动目录树** — 把文件丢进 `docs/`,左侧自动按文件夹分组\n- 🔍 **快速搜索** — 按文件名/标题即时筛选\n- 🎨 **多格式预览** — md(代码高亮 + Mermaid 图表)、pdf、docx、图片\n- 🌗 **亮/暗主题** — 一键切换\n- 📦 **零依赖离线** — 第三方库已本地化,断网也能用\n- 🚀 **双端可用** — 本地双击启动 / GitHub Pages 在线访问\n\n## 🖥️ 本地使用(Windows)\n\n双击根目录的 **`启动.bat`** 即可。它会自动扫描文档、启动本地服务(用 Windows 自带 PowerShell,**无需安装 Node/Python**)、打开浏览器。\n\n> ⚠️ 不要直接双击 `index.html`:浏览器的 `file://` 安全限制会导致读不了本地 md/pdf 文件。必须通过 `启动.bat` 起本地服务。\n\n## 🌐 在线访问(GitHub Pages)\n\n1. 把项目推送到 GitHub\n2. 仓库 **Settings → Pages → Build and deployment → Source** 选 **GitHub Actions**\n3. 推送到 `main` 分支后会自动构建部署\n4. 访问 `https://<用户名>.github.io/KnowledgeBase/`\n\n每次 push,GitHub Actions 会自动重新扫描 `docs/` 生成目录清单并部署。\n\n## 📝 添加文档\n\n把文件放进 `docs/`,支持子文件夹分组。文件名可加数字前缀控制排序(如 `01_xxx.md`,显示时自动隐藏前缀)。详见 `docs/00_使用说明.md`。\n\n## 📁 项目结构\n\n```\nKnowledgeBase/\n├── index.html              # 入口\n├── 启动.bat                # Windows 一键启动\n├── manifest.json           # 目录清单(自动生成)\n├── docs/                   # 你的文档放这里\n├── assets/\n│   ├── css/                # 设计 token + 样式\n│   ├── js/                 # app.js(主逻辑) + viewers.js(预览器)\n│   └── vendor/             # 本地化的第三方库\n├── scripts/\n│   ├── generate-manifest.ps1   # 扫描 docs/ 生成清单\n│   └── serve.ps1               # 本地静态服务器\n└── .github/workflows/pages.yml # 自动部署\n```\n\n## 🔧 技术说明\n\n- **Markdown**: marked.js + highlight.js + mermaid\n- **PDF**: PDF.js\n- **Word**: docx-preview(仅 .docx,复杂排版还原度有限)\n- 纯前端、无构建步骤\n","numLines":57,"startLine":1,"totalLines":57}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"25c9a515-7643-4721-aed6-3d9100428e80","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"D:\\Study\\KnowledgeBase","sessionId":"686eaaa5-7b41-483e-a23e-9db3d28e55b9","version":"2.1.197","gitBranch":"main"}

设计图方案.md","docs\\00_使用说明.md","assets\\js\\viewers.js","assets\\js\\app.js","assets\\css\\style.css","scripts\\generate-manifest.ps1","docs\\物料测试\\测试B_Claude原生SVG版.html","docs\\物料测试\\测试A_PollinationsAI版.html","docs\\物料测试\\assets-pollinations\\logo.jpg","docs\\物料测试\\assets-pollinations\\hero.jpg","docs\\物料测试\\assets-pollinations\\icon-delivery.jpg","docs\\物料测试\\assets-pollinations\\icon-shield.jpg","docs\\物料测试\\assets-pollinations\\icon-service.jpg","docs\\物料测试\\assets-pollinations\\product-phone.jpg","docs\\物料测试\\assets-pollinations\\product-headphone.jpg","docs\\物料测试\\assets-pollinations\\product-watch.jpg","manifest.json",".git\\FETCH_HEAD","docs\\技术方案\\20260630223000_AI生成网页图片物料方案对比.md"],"durationMs":137,"numFiles":63,"truncated":false,"totalMatches":63,"countIsComplete":true},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"25c9a515-7643-4721-aed6-3d9100428e80","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"D:\\Study\\KnowledgeBase","sessionId":"686eaaa5-7b41-483e-a23e-9db3d28e55b9","version":"2.1.197","gitBranch":"main"}
17	{"parentUuid":"d43906cd-4047-40bd-81f1-31d0038022ec","isSidechain":false,"message":{"content":[{"signature":"wNH4T6n2zhKLZfYadODLb9Z9VO+8BB2A6XsteymSZ2Un3odHZYW5cztdRrobXzlK4IF0+UaUiJf6YyQleBqXseeBVUeMkPRJ+6AaAH+qriAp9JleXvTNro+ZM6uevZ4lHJgrE4TKiT5jUbbFKQPDcilbEWSMb75h2d87sD1/xb6PP27ndIUjAki02WoBFGBw9SaJf92378RrydbF7u3cDxwq3KiJaNIdPQjOCR45mmZYa/veRJFHS5t8hT9a9Q9AAzfOqgdRu1sOmYqZvvR+xbsSYW7o65DmvpZWevnu6nHYAG4qYXN7lrSd/pjLRBpryTmh7Zk351l+7fTee42uyUXivbuLWBCgl5oQL/BcZtqp5dIv","thinking":"好的，现在我对项目有了基本了解。让我总结一下这个项目的核心信息：\n\n## 项目概况\n**KnowledgeBase** - 个人知识库项目\n\n### 主要特性\n1. **纯静态的文档浏览器**：支持 Markdown、PDF、Word(.docx)、图片等多种格式\n2. **自动目录树**：基于文件系统自动生成左侧导航\n3. **双端运行**：本地双击 `启动.bat` 或部署到 GitHub Pages\n4. **零依赖离线**：所有第三方库已本地化（marked.js、highlight.js、mermaid、PDF.js、docx-preview）\n5. **亮/暗主题切换**\n\n### 技术栈\n- 纯前端实现，无构建步骤\n- PowerShell 脚本用于本地服务和清单生成\n- GitHub Actions 自动部署\n\n### 核心文件\n- `index.html` - 单页应用入口\n- `manifest.json` - 文档目录清单（自动扫描 docs/ 生成）\n- `启动.bat` - Windows 一键启动脚本\n- `scripts/generate-manifest.ps1` - 扫描文档生成清单\n- `scripts/serve.ps1` - 本地静态服务器\n- `assets/js/app.js` - 主逻辑\n- `assets/js/viewers.js` - 各类文件预览器\n\n### 当前文档内容\n根据 manifest.json，docs/ 下有：\n- **技术方案**：本地Claude绘制AI原型设计图方案、AI生成网页图片物料方案对比\n- **示例方案**：方案讨论模板\n- **物料测试**：测试A_PollinationsAI版、测试B_Claude原生SVG版（包含测试图片素材）\n- **使用说明**：00_使用说明.md\n\n### Git 状态\n- 当前分支：main\n- 修改：README.md 已修改\n- 新增：.github/、assets/、docs/、scripts/、index.html、manifest.json、启动.bat\n\n现在用户说\"先熟悉下项目我们来讨论问题\"，我已经熟悉完了，应该告诉用户我已经了解项目结构，等待他提出具体问题。\n","type":"thinking"},{"text":"已经熟悉了项目结构 ✓\n\n## 项目概览\n\n**KnowledgeBase** — 个人知识库文档浏览器\n\n### 核心特性\n- 📂 纯静态、离线可用的文档系统\n- 🎨 支持 Markdown / PDF / Word / 图片预览\n- 🔍 自动生成目录树 + 快速搜索\n- 🌗 亮/暗主题切换\n- 🚀 本地双击启动（启动.bat）/ GitHub Pages 在线部署\n\n### 技术架构\n- **前端**：纯 HTML/CSS/JS，无构建步骤\n- **第三方库**：marked、highlight.js、mermaid、PDF.js、docx-preview（已本地化）\n- **自动化**：PowerShell 脚本生成清单 + GitHub Actions 部署\n\n### 当前文档分类\n- 技术方案（AI 原型设计、物料生成方案对比）\n- 示例方案（讨论模板）\n- 物料测试（Pollinations AI vs Claude SVG 对比测试）\n\n---\n\n有什么问题要讨论？或者需要我做什么？","type":"text"}],"conversationId":"8166cd2b-9b4c-4c04-9d92-132362f4489a","conversation_id":"8166cd2b-9b4c-4c04-9d92-132362f4489a","id":"msg_eXP5QGpUkk7tkKjQG1IjTuoB","model":"claude-opus-4-8","role":"assistant","stop_reason":"end_turn","type":"message","usage":{"input_tokens":25512,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1310,"cache_read_input_tokens":12351,"output_tokens":1020,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"}},"type":"assistant","uuid":"3fad7718-5d63-4669-a2b1-73f07097ffc1","timestamp":"2026-07-01T01:37:39.391Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"D:\\Study\\KnowledgeBase","sessionId":"686eaaa5-7b41-483e-a23e-9db3d28e55b9","version":"2.1.197","gitBranch":"main"}

19	{"type":"file-history-snapshot","messageId":"99271d87-f257-4fa5-86c8-9070fee9674f","snapshot":{"messageId":"99271d87-f257-4fa5-86c8-9070fee9674f","trackedFileBackups":{},"timestamp":"2026-07-01T01:38:20.665Z"},"isSnapshotUpdate":false}
20	{"parentUuid":"4739e272-f60c-4a79-a974-532e82a50e63","isSidechain":false,"promptId":"74bd7d43-82f6-438d-96cd-6970b1528333","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":"我们要讨论的问题是,claude能够读取自己的对话信息吗,从对话信息里面获取我需要整理的内容,比如我需要整理开发某个项目中遇到的问题,可以提取的经验,用于指导后续的开发.这样我就需要把这个项目开发时的所有对话信息都作为上下文来整理."},"uuid":"99271d87-f257-4fa5-86c8-9070fee9674f","timestamp":"2026-07-01T01:38:20.663Z","permissionMode":"default","origin":{"kind":"human"},"promptSource":"typed","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"D:\\Study\\KnowledgeBase","sessionId":"686eaaa5-7b41-483e-a23e-9db3d28e55b9","version":"2.1.197","gitBranch":"main"}
21	{"parentUuid":"99271d87-f257-4fa5-86c8-9070fee9674f","isSidechain":false,"message":{"content":[{"signature":"AJVhCCN7SsqKfGOp7YnSqQ0COJquSDfFjWrce0uk8tMwFG3cR68iQl3FPYbuRTTj/ANGh+UkNNeK/xs80f0yvqi9AIo+4iJs5lBTEhEhD7Y8Sruu44UrzF4/EUFykf3cdkIMOQTk/S+buEgNAmUCsmooVg1PZy/XH/IVpLGZ6+TnllTeu07n2Y0PrVovf1Mp8htd7w01XCadN/tc+YYyQrEfqCyHy+OobcSBFJ4WdFT+bRDqagr6KqR4I2yPyE9vJ2smd86b+B96iIYDm8vQVNrnOfUxTHwZH02hOWwhq5x+8YzRIYyV","thinking":"用户提出了一个很有价值的问题：**Claude 能否读取自己的对话历史，从中提取经验和问题整理成文档？**\n\n这涉及几个关键点：\n\n1. **Claude Code 的对话持久化机制**\n   - Claude Code 确实会保存对话历史\n   - 通常存储在本地文件系统中\n\n2. **对话存储位置**\n   - 根据我看到的环境信息，用户的 Claude 配置在 `C:\\Users\\fjyu9\\.claude\\`\n   - 对话历史通常在 `.claude/conversations/` 或类似路径\n\n3. **可行性分析**\n   - ✅ 理论可行：如果能找到对话历史文件，我可以读取并分析\n   - ✅ 格式通常是 JSON 或 JSONL\n   - ✅ 我有 Read、Grep、Glob 工具可以访问本地文件\n\n4. **实现思路**\n   - 先探测对话历史的存储位置\n   - 读取指定项目/时间段的对话\n   - 提取关键信息：问题、解决方案、决策、经验教训\n   - 按照用户的 CLAUDE.md 规范整理成文档\n\n5. **潜在限制**\n   - 对话文件可能很大，需要分段处理\n   - 需要过滤噪音（greeting、简单确认等）\n   - 需要识别上下文边界（哪些对话属于同一个项目）\n\n让我先探测一下对话历史的存储位置和格式。\n","type":"thinking"}],"id":"msg_rPjednbpdMLHyy3bgSYuIS1l","model":"claude-opus-4-8","role":"assistant","stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null,"type":"message","usage":{"input_tokens":25520,"cache_creation_input_tokens":699,"cache_read_input_tokens":14012,"output_tokens":731,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":699},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"},"stop_details":null},"type":"assistant","uuid":"0993536d-f847-422d-b889-4f14658935f8","timestamp":"2026-07-01T01:38:31.773Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"D:\\Study\\KnowledgeBase","sessionId":"686eaaa5-7b41-483e-a23e-9db3d28e55b9","version":"2.1.197","gitBranch":"main"}
22	{"parentUuid":"0993536d-f847-422d-b889-4f14658935f8","isSidechain":false,"message":{"content":[{"text":"这是个很好的想法！让我先探测一下 Claude Code 的对话历史存储情况。","type":"text"}],"id":"msg_rPjednbpdMLHyy3bgSYuIS1l","model":"claude-opus-4-8","role":"assistant","stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null,"type":"message","usage":{"input_tokens":25520,"cache_creation_input_tokens":699,"cache_read_input_tokens":14012,"output_tokens":731,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":699},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"},"stop_details":null},"type":"assistant","uuid":"539c1fc6-abff-4aa4-b7c4-05a7803e8c5a","timestamp":"2026-07-01T01:38:32.498Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"D:\\Study\\KnowledgeBase","sessionId":"686eaaa5-7b41-483e-a23e-9db3d28e55b9","version":"2.1.197","gitBranch":"main"}

31	{"type":"last-prompt","lastPrompt":"我们要讨论的问题是,claude能够读取自己的对话信息吗,从对话信息里面获取我需要整理的内容,比如我需要整理开发某个项目中遇到的问题,可以提取的经验,用于指导后续的开发.这样我就需要把这个项目开发时的所有对话信息都作为上下文来整理.","leafUuid":"e8b13e1c-ae90-4a26-92cc-e047bd83a756","sessionId":"686eaaa5-7b41-483e-a23e-9db3d28e55b9"}

46	{"parentUuid":"48f189fb-ea7a-4caa-bb2c-f432820ee184","isSidechain":false,"message":{"content":[{"signature":"2oKWwvBJLW4k3KZw9YsOwhHtrwsN5BD2h4D0mTOIVcb8CWW2Y5bWnsjnrJn/WpWBPqJwvbDdRDyjjReZfQqSfVEA28cUzDcyE9KjkeEjOYo4nBcbD5jjEbLNFRwWYAyFY10QvARMpB0M2f9wm480OtJsg6sZY1NAQyQ25m+yKsWze+4H0Uz2WLiICaOD2TMkcBYtfbPNOfa71r+SAQpO76NsE1MK8fnwHZ2AyNRtK5Pyr/UsdAoBsCdsOZyxl/oEqtLWiEX7f2z7nJSNKRGGFkebgCiUdn5f/CQ+KqgRr4Ok91TbQLgxofnqWN7WdZZnZ32jNDKzWnEsj9MS","thinking":"用户说\"执行工具任务\"，结合之前的讨论，我需要：\n\n1. 读取当前会话的对话记录文件\n2. 分析对话内容，提取有价值的信息\n3. 整理成文档\n\n从刚才的查询结果看到：\n- 当前会话ID是 `686eaaa5-7b41-483e-a23e-9db3d28e55b9`\n- 对应的对话文件应该在 `C:\\Users\\fjyu9\\.claude\\projects\\D--Study-KnowledgeBase\\686eaaa5-7b41-483e-a23e-9db3d28e55b9.jsonl`\n\n让我先读取这个文件，看看格式和内容，然后提取关键信息整理成文档。\n","type":"thinking"}],"id":"msg_hrXI67fd1Sw7loXoDJzL8oTm","model":"claude-opus-4-8","role":"assistant","stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null,"type":"message","usage":{"input_tokens":25640,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1353,"cache_read_input_tokens":16924,"output_tokens":425,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":1353},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"},"stop_details":null},"type":"assistant","uuid":"6901e835-47bd-4cfa-8109-b3125cb02cf7","timestamp":"2026-07-01T01:41:29.918Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"D:\\Study\\KnowledgeBase","sessionId":"686eaaa5-7b41-483e-a23e-9db3d28e55b9","version":"2.1.197","gitBranch":"main"}
